product_overview: WIXI is a modular, scalable Multi‑App SaaS platform providing centralized authentication, dynamic menu (RBAC-driven) management and audit logging to support pluggable application modules. The backend exposes versioned APIs to support secure JWT session management and administrative operations.
core_goals: Provide secure JWT-based authentication with refresh token support and clear auth lifecycle (login/register/me).
Support dynamic RBAC-driven menus persisted in the database so UI navigation is configurable per-role and per-user.
Expose administrative APIs for user management and audit logs for traceability (IP, User-Agent, timestamps).
Adopt a modular monolith / CQRS architecture (MediatR) that enables maintainability and pluggable modules.
Ensure APIs are versioned (/api/v1/...) and return clear success and error responses for frontend integration.

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Handles user registration and login, issues JWT access tokens (and refresh mechanism) and returns current authenticated user details.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/Auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT access token in response body and Secure HTTP-Only refresh cookie set -> GET /api/v1/Auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with authenticated user profile
POST /api/v1/Auth/register with valid new user payload -> Receive 201 Created with created user id -> POST /api/v1/Auth/login with newly registered credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT access token
POST /api/v1/Auth/login with invalid credentials (wrong password) -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> POST /api/v1/Auth/login with missing required fields (e.g., no password) -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Menu Management API
features.description: Provides sidebar menus tailored to the authenticated user and administrative endpoints to retrieve all menus for management and migrations.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/Menu/sidebar with valid Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with sidebar menu JSON filtered by user's roles/permissions
GET /api/v1/Menu/all with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> -> Receive 200 with full menus list for admin management and export
GET /api/v1/Menu/sidebar without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> GET /api/v1/Menu/all with non-admin token -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: User Management API
features.description: Administrative endpoint to list users and support interfaces that assign menus/permissions to individual users.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/UserManagement/users with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> -> Receive 200 with paged list of users (including role and menu assignment metadata)
GET /api/v1/UserManagement/users with expired or invalid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> GET /api/v1/UserManagement/users with valid token lacking admin role -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Audit Logging API
features.description: Expose system activity and audit logs (login/logout, changes) with filters for time range and other metadata to support compliance and incident investigation.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/Audit?startDate=2026-04-01&endDate=2026-04-04 with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> -> Receive 200 with filtered audit entries including IP address, user-agent, action and timestamps

GET /api/v1/Audit with malformed date filter (startDate=not-a-date) with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> -> Receive 400 Bad Request -> GET /api/v1/Audit without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
